Short CV

Birgül Erbaş was born in Bolu in 1987. In 2006,She graduated from Yeniçağa 60th Year Multi-Program High School. She graduated from Anadolu University Faculty of Business Administration in 2012. She received training as an esthetician at a private Academy. She worked in the aesthetics and beauty units of Medcity Surgical Medical Center, Yeditepe University Hospital and Darıca Hayat Medical Center. She worked as a skin care teacher at Toki Vocational and Technical Anatolian High School and as a lecturer at the Department of Hair Care and Beauty Services at Istanbul Kent University. She is currently continuing her undergraduate education in sociology at Istanbul University.
